$schema_note: Proposed analyzer rules not yet promoted to BD-AR-*. Staging area to keep the active rule set curated. Promote when validated against real pipelines.

candidates.name: count() called repeatedly for control flow
candidates.rationale: Repeated actions re-trigger the DAG; expensive at scale (BD-CN-073 adjacent).
candidates.promote_when: We can distinguish a single diagnostic count from a loop of counts.

candidates.name: repartition with a hardcoded small n
candidates.rationale: Fixed small partition counts ignore data size; risk OOM/under-parallelism (BD-CN-027/030).
candidates.promote_when: We can read whether n is data-aware or hardcoded.

candidates.name: Wide transform before filter
candidates.rationale: Join/groupby placed before an available row filter, shuffling rows later discarded (BD-CN-028/076).
candidates.promote_when: We can detect filter-after-shuffle reliably in the plan.

candidates.name: Broadcast hint on a too-large side
candidates.rationale: Forcing broadcast of a side that won't fit OOMs executors (BD-CN-036).
candidates.promote_when: We can estimate the hinted side's post-pruning size.

candidates.name: CSV/JSON used as analytical storage
candidates.rationale: Row-oriented text re-parsed every read; columnar/table format preferred (BD-CN-050).
candidates.promote_when: We can distinguish interchange I/O from analytical storage.

candidates.name: No schema/contract on a recurring source
candidates.rationale: Re-inference per read invites drift; table-format schema evolution preferred (BD-CN-054).
candidates.promote_when: We can detect absence of an expected-schema check.
